name: Pattern Group Inc.
business: Pattern is a global ecommerce acceleration platform that helps consumer brands sell products on global ecommerce marketplaces. It generates the substantial majority of its revenue from consumer product sales on global ecommerce marketplaces. The company's proprietary technology and on-demand experts operate across more than 70 marketplaces.

exposures.sentence: We generate the substantial majority of our revenue from consumer product sales on global ecommerce marketplaces.
Fulfillment: Includes marketplace preparation and shipping services that support delivery to marketplaces and direct-to-consumer channels and help streamline inbound logistics.
Our warehouse automation strategy emphasizes scalable software integrated with standardized hardware solutions.
Utilizing more than 66 trillion data points and sophisticated machine learning and artificial intelligence ( AI ), we strive to optimize and automate key levers of ecommerce growth.

tamClaims.claim: The global ecommerce market is approximately $4 trillion and is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 9.5% from 2026 to 2030, representing more than $500 billion of annual growth.
tamClaims.sentence: Pattern operates within the global ecommerce market, which is estimated to be approximately $4 trillion in size and forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 9.5% from 2026 to 2030, representing more than $500 billion of annual growth.

tamClaims.claim: Global ecommerce sales are expected to grow more than two times as fast as all other global non-ecommerce sales from 2026 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Consumers are increasingly shopping online and, as a result, global ecommerce sales are expected to grow more than two times as fast as all other global non-ecommerce sales from 2026 to 2030.
